text: Wow, I’m honestly disappointed with all the golf hate here. Just because you don’t enjoy something doesn’t mean you need to actively sh*t on it. Golf is one of the most popular sports worldwide and is enjoyed by millions of people. It’s actually an incredibly fun and relaxing activity. I guarantee most of the people commenting here didn’t grow up with golf. I understand it’s expensive so not everyone has access to it, but that’s not a reason to hate it. As an avid golfer who’s been playing since I was 5, it’s just disappointing to read all these comments cuz i guarantee most of you have never even given golf a real chance. It’s both incredibly challenging and rewarding when you hit a good shot. Plus, when your friends and family play, a golf outing can be incredibly fun. Have a few drinks on the course and just relax.
